# VacationDeals.to

> The world's largest vacation deal aggregator for timeshare resort preview packages.

## About
VacationDeals.to compares vacation deals from 21+ timeshare resort brands across 50+ destinations. We track prices daily from brands like Westgate Resorts, Hilton Grand Vacations, Marriott Vacation Club, Club Wyndham, and 17 other providers. Deals start at $59 for 3-night premium resort stays.

Vacation deals (also called "vacpacks" or "preview packages") are deeply discounted resort stays offered by timeshare companies. In exchange for the reduced rate — often 60-80% below retail — guests attend a brief timeshare sales presentation during their stay. There is no obligation to purchase anything.

## Key Pages
- [All Vacation Deals](https://vacationdeals.to/deals): Browse 336+ resort deals with filters for destination, brand, price, and duration
- [Rate Recap](https://vacationdeals.to/rate-recap): Daily price tracking chart across all brands
- [Blog](https://vacationdeals.to/blog): 100+ guides on vacation deals, brand reviews, destination tips
- [All Destinations](https://vacationdeals.to/destinations): Browse deals by vacation destination
- [All Brands](https://vacationdeals.to/brands): Browse deals by resort brand or broker

## Brands We Track

### Direct Resort Brands
- [Westgate Resorts](https://vacationdeals.to/westgate): One of the largest privately held timeshare companies in the US
- [Hilton Grand Vacations](https://vacationdeals.to/hgv): Hilton's vacation ownership brand with Hilton Honors integration
- [Marriott Vacation Club](https://vacationdeals.to/marriott): Premium vacation ownership by Marriott with Bonvoy points
- [Club Wyndham](https://vacationdeals.to/wyndham): Part of Travel + Leisure Co., 230+ resorts worldwide
- [Holiday Inn Club Vacations](https://vacationdeals.to/holiday-inn): IHG's vacation ownership brand
- [Hyatt Vacation Ownership](https://vacationdeals.to/hyatt): Hyatt's vacation club with World of Hyatt integration
- [Bluegreen Vacations](https://vacationdeals.to/bluegreen): Flexible vacation ownership at drive-to destinations
- [Capital Vacations](https://vacationdeals.to/capital-vacations): Growing vacation ownership across the eastern US
- [Vacation Village Resorts](https://vacationdeals.to/vacation-village): Direct resort brand with deals from $49
- [Spinnaker Resorts](https://vacationdeals.to/spinnaker): Hilton Head, Branson, Williamsburg, and Ormond Beach resorts
- [Westgate Events](https://vacationdeals.to/westgate-events): Westgate's event-based vacation packages
- [Legendary Vacation Club](https://vacationdeals.to/legendary): Luxury vacation club tied to Hard Rock Hotels and Palace Resorts
- [Festiva Hospitality Group](https://vacationdeals.to/festiva): 21 resorts across unique US destinations

### Broker/Aggregator Brands
- [BookVIP](https://vacationdeals.to/bookvip): Leading broker specializing in all-inclusive Mexico and Caribbean deals
- [Monster Reservations Group](https://vacationdeals.to/mrg): Large broker partnering with multiple timeshare brands
- [GetawayDealz](https://vacationdeals.to/getawaydealz): Online vacation package broker
- [VacationVIP](https://vacationdeals.to/vacationvip): Broker connecting travelers with discounted resort stays
- [BestVacationDealz](https://vacationdeals.to/bestvacationdealz): Discount vacation package provider
- [StayPromo](https://vacationdeals.to/staypromo): Florida-licensed vacation deal broker
- [Departure Depot](https://vacationdeals.to/departure-depot): Modern broker with 150+ destinations worldwide
- [Las Vegas Timeshare](https://vacationdeals.to/vegas-timeshare): Las Vegas-focused vacation deal broker
- [Premier Travel Resorts](https://vacationdeals.to/premier-travel): Florida-based broker with packages in Orlando, Las Vegas, and more
- [Discount Vacation Hotels](https://vacationdeals.to/discount-vacation): Villa Group promotional arm for Mexico resort deals

- [4-Night Packages](https://vacationdeals.to/4-night-packages)
- [5-Night Packages](https://vacationdeals.to/5-night-packages)

## How Vacation Deals Work
Vacation deals (vacpacks) are a legitimate marketing strategy used by major timeshare resort companies. Here is how they work:

1. **Browse deals**: Compare vacation deals from 21+ brands. Filter by destination, price, and duration.
2. **Book your deal**: Book directly through the resort or broker at 60-80% below retail pricing.
3. **Attend a presentation**: In exchange for the discounted rate, attend a 90-120 minute timeshare sales presentation. No purchase is required.

Typical eligibility requirements include: minimum age 25-30, minimum household income $50,000-$75,000/year, married or cohabiting with a partner who must also attend, valid ID, and a major credit card.

- Full LLM reference (with live deal data): https://vacationdeals.to/llms-full.txt
- RSS Feed: https://vacationdeals.to/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://vacationdeals.to/sitemap.xml
- AI Plugin manifest: https://vacationdeals.to/.well-known/ai-plugin.json

VacationDeals.to is an independent comparison site. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any resort or timeshare company.
